name: Applesauce Cake in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the applesauce and water until combined.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and spices into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring continuously.
6. Mix in nuts if using.
7. Spoon the batter into well-greased pint jars with wide mouths and no necks.
8. Fill each jar about halfway.
9. Bake at 325°F for 45 minutes.
10. Allow jars to cool completely before sealing them tightly.
11. Decorate the tops of the jars with fabric and ribbon if desired.
12. Store in a cupboard. The cake should keep sealed for up to one year.
